prose: **Acrolein Fukui reactivity analysis** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fitted, PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The calculation computed Mulliken partial charges for the neutral, cationic (+1, doublet), and anionic (−1, doublet) states, from which the Fukui indices were derived. All three SCF calculations converged. The most electrophilic site is C (atom 4, the terminal vinyl carbon) with f⁺ = 0.642; the most nucleophilic site is O (atom 1, the carbonyl oxygen) with f⁻ = 0.394. The dual descriptor Δf = f⁺ − f⁻ is most positive at C4 (+0.555), indicating it is favored for nucleophilic attack, while O shows balanced electrophilic/nucleophilic character (Δf ≈ 0.008). Fukui charge conservation checks passed (sum f⁺ = 1.000, sum f⁻ = 1.000), confirming convergence integrity. A Fukui index visualization has been generated.
